=== info.txt

===================
Bob Dylan
1992.04.07 
Palais Theatre,Melbourne
Victoria, Australia

FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-2


CD1

1 All Along The Watchtower 
2 Simple Twist Of Fate 
3 Everything Is Broken 
4 Just Like A Woman 
5 Tangled Up In Blue 
6 She Belongs To Me 
7 Maggie's Farm 
8 Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic) 
9 Little Moses (acoustic) 
10 Golden Vanity (acoustic)

CD2

1 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic w band) 
2 Cat's In The Well 
3 I Believe In You 
4 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic w band) 
5 Highway 61 Revisited 
6 Absolutely Sweet Marie 
7 Ballad Of A Thin Man 
8 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 



8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
2-5, 8, 11, 13, 14, 16, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
10  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal), John Jackson (guitar).
11, 14  acoustic with the band.
5, 14  Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
15  Bucky Baxter (electric slide guitar).

BobTalk:
Here's a song about ... uh ... somebody who went to sea. (before Golden Vanity).

This is my first time playin' here at this hall. Maybe I ...Somebody asked me if I'd come back next year and play it again. So, yes you, you all come back, now.[from the audience: "We love you Bob. We love you Bob"] You what?? [someone: "We love you Bob"] You love me? Can you believe it? (turning to the band) They love me! (before Blowin' In The Wind).
